samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_8bit">
    <description>Multiplies two 8-bit operands using a shift-and-add approach.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[7:0]">First 8-bit input operand (multiplicand).</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">Second 8-bit input operand (multiplier).</input>
        <output id="product" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit output representing the product of A and B.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // Initialize variables
        integer i;
        reg [15:0] product_reg = 16'd0; // Register to hold the product
        reg [7:0] multiplicand = 8'd0;   // Register to hold the multiplicand
        reg [7:0] multiplier = 8'd0;     // Register to hold the multiplier
        
        // Assign input values to local variables
        always @(posedge clk) begin
            multiplicand <= A;
            multiplier <= B;
        end
        
        // Perform multiplication operation
        always @(posedge clk) begin
            if (i < 8) begin
                if (multiplier[i]) begin
                    product_reg <= product_reg + (multiplicand << i);
                end
                i <= i + 1;
            end else begin
                i <= 0;
            end
        end
        
        // Output the final product
        assign product = product_reg;
        
    </implementation>
    
</module>
